title: Let's Do It Again
writer: Mary Loos, Arthur Richman, Richard Sale
actors: Jane Wyman, Ray Milland, Aldo Ray
plot: In this 1953 musical remake of "The Awful Truth", Wyman is married to womanizing composer Milland and sets out to give him some of his own medicine. She has an affair, but her ploy backfires, and the couple get a divorce. Once sep...
